command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /raid/chen034/workspace/stwm
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 STWM_PROC_TITLE=python STWM_PROC_TITLE_MODE=generic PYTHONPATH=code /home/chen034/miniconda3/envs/stwm/bin/python code/stwm/tracewm_v2_stage2/trainers/train_tracewm_stage2_smalltrain.py \
  --resume-from outputs/checkpoints/stage2_tusb_v3p1_medium_semantic_state_v1_20260427/latest.pt \
  --skip-resume-optimizer \
  --predecode-cache-path /raid/chen034/workspace/stwm/data/processed/stage2_tusb_v3_predecode_cache_20260418 \
  --teacher-semantic-cache-path /raid/chen034/workspace/stwm/data/processed/stage2_teacher_semantic_cache_v4_appearance_20260418 \
  --stage2-structure-mode trace_unit_semantic_binding \
  --trace-unit-use-instance-prior-bias \
  --enable-future-semantic-state-head \
  --future-semantic-head-only-warmup \
  --future-semantic-head-only-warmup-steps 100 \
  --freeze-non-future-semantic-head-during-warmup \
  --future-reappearance-mask-policy at_risk_only \
  --future-reappearance-event-loss-weight 0.08 \
  --future-reappearance-loss-weight 0.04 \
  --future-visibility-loss-weight 0.02 \
  --future-semantic-loss-weight 0.005 \
  --future-identity-belief-loss-weight 0.002 \
  --future-uncertainty-loss-weight 0.0 \
  --future-reappearance-pos-weight auto \
  --future-reappearance-pos-weight-max 50 \
  --future-hypothesis-count 1 \
  --future-hypothesis-loss-weight 0.0 \
  --reappearance-positive-oversample \
  --reappearance-positive-min-batch-ratio 0.30 \
  --lr 3e-6 \
  --max-samples-train 128 \
  --max-samples-val 64 \
  --batch-size 1 \
  --train-steps 11144 \
  --eval-interval 50 \
  --eval-max-batches 4 \
  --save-every-n-steps 50 \
  --output-dir outputs/checkpoints/stage2_tusb_v3p1_reappearance_headonly_v2_20260427 \
  --run-name stage2_tusb_v3p1_reappearance_headonly_v2_20260427 \
  --run-summary-json reports/stwm_reappearance_headonly_v2_summary_raw_20260427.json \
  --progress-json reports/stwm_reappearance_headonly_v2_progress_20260427.json \
  --seed 20260427
